title: Colorful Texts
description: Makes important text have special colors!
body:
Ever wanted to make your game look a bit better?

Well, you found the right pack for you!

This pack changes the color of some GUI texts to make them stand out!


<details>
<summary>Supported texts</summary>
- Creative inventory tab texts
- On/off texts
- Fancy/fabulous/fast graphic settings
</details>

This pack has built-in [ResPackOpts]([https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)) support. With this mod you can customize the pack in-game! To do it, install the mod, and then open the resource pack selection screen. You'll see a button next to the pack's name, click it and toggle on/off every feature available! 

# FAQ
Q: How do I use the in-game config screen?

A: Install the mod [ResPackOpts]([https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)), then go to the resource pack selection screen and click on the button next to the pack's name.

Q: Does the pack work even if I don't have ResPackOpts installed?

A: Yes!

Q: Can I redistribute the pack?

A: No, you CANNOT redistribute the pack on any website or share the file. Please share the link!

Q: Can I include your pack in my modpack?

A: 
- Modrinth modpacks: Yes with proper credit (link in desc.)
- .zip modpacks: No. Please share the link
- The pack file: No. Please share the link
